conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ɡʊd ˌæftərˈnuːn | ˈwɛlkəm tə ˌkeɪ ɛf ˈsiː | wʌt kən aɪ ɡɛt fə ju təˈdeɪ?
conversation.english: Good afternoon! Welcome to KFC. What can I get for you today?
conversation.chinese: 下午好！欢迎光临肯德基，请问今天想要点什么？

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: haɪ ðeər | hmmm | aɪl hæv ə ˈzɪŋər ˈbɜːrɡər ˈkɒmboʊ pliz
conversation.english: Hi there. Hmm… I’ll have a Zinger Burger combo, please.
conversation.chinese: 你好，嗯……我要一个劲爆鸡腿堡套餐，谢谢。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ʃʊr | wʊdʒə laɪk ðæt wɪð fraɪz ən ə drɪŋk
conversation.english: Sure! Would you like that with fries and a drink?
conversation.chinese: 好的！您要搭配薯条和饮料吗？

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: jɛs pliz | kənaɪ tʃeɪndʒ ðə drɪŋk tə aɪst ˈkɔːfi
conversation.english: Yes, please. Can I change the drink to iced coffee?
conversation.chinese: 好的，谢谢。我可以把饮料换成冰咖啡吗？

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: əv kɔrs | ðædl bi ən ˈɛkstrə ˈfɪfti sɛnts | ɪz ðæɾoʊˈkeɪ
conversation.english: Of course. That’ll be an extra fifty cents. Is that okay?
conversation.chinese: 当然可以，那需要多加五十美分，可以吗？

conversation.speaker: A
conversation.pronunciation: noʊ ˈprɒbləm | oʊ ən kənaɪ ˈɔːlsoʊ æd sɪks ˈpisəz əv ˈtʃɪkən ˈnʌɡɪts
conversation.english: No problem. Oh, and can I also add six pieces of chicken nuggets?
conversation.chinese: 没问题。哦，我还可以加六块鸡块吗？

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ˈæbsəluːtli | wʊdʒə laɪk ɛni ˈdɪpɪn sɔs wɪð ðæt — ˈbɑːrbɪkjuː, ˈhʌni ˈmʌstərd, ɔr swiːt ˈtʃɪli
conversation.english: Absolutely. Would you like any dipping sauce with that — barbecue, honey mustard, or sweet chili?
conversation.chinese: 当然可以。您想要蘸酱吗？有烧烤味、蜂蜜芥末和甜辣酱。

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ɡɑɾɪt | soʊ ðæts wʌn ˈzɪŋər ˈkɒmboʊ wɪð aɪst ˈkɔːfi ən sɪks ˈnʌɡɪts wɪð ˈbɑːrbɪkjuː sɔs | ˈɛniθɪŋ ɛls
conversation.english: Got it. So that’s one Zinger combo with iced coffee and six nuggets with barbecue sauce. Anything else?
conversation.chinese: 好的，一个劲爆鸡腿堡套餐（冰咖啡）和六块鸡块（烧烤酱），还需要别的吗？

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ɡreɪt | jər ˈtoʊɾl ɪz ˈtɛn ˈsɛvnti faɪv | wʊdʒə laɪk tə daɪn ɪn ɔr teɪkaʊt
conversation.english: Great! Your total is $10.75. Would you like to dine in or take out?
conversation.chinese: 好的！一共是10.75美元，您是堂食还是外带？

conversation.speaker: B
conversation.pronunciation: ˈpɜːrfɪkt | pliz weɪt baɪ ðə ˈkaʊntər | wɪl kɔl jər ˈnʌmbər wɛn ɪts ˈrɛdi
conversation.english: Perfect. Please wait by the counter; we’ll call your number when it’s ready.
conversation.chinese: 好的，请在柜台旁等候，我们做好后会叫您的号。
